modelVsUniform.methodologyNote: Paired significance evaluated via clustered bootstrap on match-level paired differences clustered by tournament edition (§2.2), reporting aligned two-sided 95% percentile confidence intervals and two-sided empirical p-values (H0: delta = 0), avoiding the overlapping CI fallacy.

modelVsHistoricalFrequency.methodologyNote: Paired significance evaluated via clustered bootstrap on match-level paired differences clustered by tournament edition (§2.2), reporting aligned two-sided 95% percentile confidence intervals and two-sided empirical p-values (H0: delta = 0), avoiding the overlapping CI fallacy.
